dependencies: Single source suppliers for certain raw materials including cobalt, tantalum, chromium, rhenium, nickel, and titanium
Dependence on foreign sources for certain raw materials
Reliance on specific procurement requirements that limit suppliers and subcontractors
Dependence on powder metal suppliers for engine parts manufacturing
Supply chain disruptions driven by market constraints, inflation, and labor shortages
risks: Supply chain disruptions impacting ability to procure raw materials, microelectronics, and commodities
Geopolitical conditions including conflicts and strained intercountry relations
Supplier capacity constraints and quality issues
Price increases and inflation affecting material and component costs
Supplier closing, bankruptcy, or financial difficulties
Concentration risk in certain geographic regions for critical materials
Rare condition in powder metal used in engine parts requiring accelerated inspections

regulatory_risks: U.S. government contract termination for convenience or default
Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) compliance requirements
Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement (DFARS) compliance
Export Administration Regulations (EAR) compliance
International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR) compliance
Arms Export Control Act (AECA) compliance
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) certification and airworthiness requirements
Environmental regulations including greenhouse gas emissions and carbon pricing
Cost Accounting Standards (CAS) compliance disputes
Deferred Prosecution Agreements (DPA) compliance and monitoring requirements
SEC Administrative Order compliance
Department of State Consent Agreement compliance for export controls
Suspension or debarment from U.S. government contracting
Industrial cooperation and offset obligations (ICIP agreements)
Cybersecurity regulations and mandatory disclosure obligations
Data privacy regulations including EU regulations
Trade compliance and sanctions regulations
Clean Air Act and Clean Water Act compliance
Comprehensive Environmental Response Compensation and Liability Act (Superfund)
Product safety and quality regulations across multiple jurisdictions
Anti-bribery and anti-corruption laws in multiple jurisdictions

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions impacting supply chain and business operations
China sanctions against Raytheon and Collins joint venture
Potential additional sanctions enforcement by China
Export controls targeting Russia aerospace sector
Russian counter-sanctions against U.S. entities and individuals
Sanctions on Russian-owned entities affecting titanium supply
Risk of sanctions on other countries affecting operations
U.S. government approval delays for foreign military sales due to sanctions
Trade restrictions and tariffs affecting international operations
